{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Marketing Manager- Flexible Packaging",
  "description": "MarbleClear Limited is a full service Human Resources Management firm committed to optimizing the value of HR within your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Marketing Manager- Flexible Packaging

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full time

Key Responsibilities


	Achieve growth and hit sales targets through strategic sales and marketing execution.
	Develop and implement effective sales and marketing strategies to drive market penetration and revenue growth.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with customers by understanding their operational and technical needs.
	Present periodic sales, revenue, expense reports, and realistic forecasts to management.
	Identify emerging markets, customer segments, and new business opportunities.
	Ensure timely collection of outstanding receivables in line with company credit policies.
	Conduct accurate sales forecasting using customer data, historical trends, and market intelligence.
	Maintain optimal sales volume, product mix, and pricing strategies based on market conditions and competitor positioning.
	Handle customer complaints professionally and ensure high levels of satisfaction.
	Provide technical advisory support to customers on product specifications and packaging solutions.
	Stay updated on product innovations, economic indicators, and competitive activities.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Social Sciences, or related field.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in the flexible packaging or converting industry, with at least 3 years in a managerial role.
	Strong technical and commercial understanding of laminates, films, and related flexible packaging products.
	Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets.
	Strong knowledge of market dynamics, competitor analysis, and industry trends.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong analytical and sales forecasting capability.


Salary&nbsp;
N500,000 - N800000 monthly.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-26",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-21",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "MarbleClear"
    
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "maxValue": 600000,

    }

}



Sales & Marketing Manager- Flexible Packaging Job at MarbleClear Limited




        
    

        
        MarbleClear Limited is a full service Human Resources Management firm committed to optimizing the value of HR within your business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Marketing Manager- Flexible Packaging

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Achieve growth and hit sales targets through strategic sales and marketing execution.
	Develop and implement effective sales and marketing strategies to drive market penetration and revenue growth.
	Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with customers by understanding their operational and technical needs.
	Present periodic sales, revenue, expense reports, and realistic forecasts to management.
	Identify emerging markets, customer segments, and new business opportunities.
	Ensure timely collection of outstanding receivables in line with company credit policies.
	Conduct accurate sales forecasting using customer data, historical trends, and market intelligence.
	Maintain optimal sales volume, product mix, and pricing strategies based on market conditions and competitor positioning.
	Handle customer complaints professionally and ensure high levels of satisfaction.
	Provide technical advisory support to customers on product specifications and packaging solutions.
	Stay updated on product innovations, economic indicators, and competitive activities.


Key Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Social Sciences, or related field.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in the flexible packaging or converting industry, with at least 3 years in a managerial role.
	Strong technical and commercial understanding of laminates, films, and related flexible packaging products.
	Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets.
	Strong knowledge of market dynamics, competitor analysis, and industry trends.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong analytical and sales forecasting capability.


Salary 
N500,000 - N800000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Driver / Logistics Officer",
  "description": "Naji Realties is a leading hospitality and real estate company in Nigeria, dedicated to providing exceptional services and experiences that exceed our customers&#39; expectations. With a strong presence in Abuja and Lagos, our experts are passionate about delivering top-notch solutions in property development, management, and hospitality.&nbsp;If you share our values and passion for excellence, we invite you to explore career opportunities with us. At Naji Realties, we foster a culture of growth, learning, and collaboration. Be part of our dynamic team and help us shape the future of hospitality and real estate in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Driver / Logistics Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Utako, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Part-time

Job Description


	The Driver / Logistics Officer is responsible for providing safe and efficient transportation, while supporting the coordination of logistics operations within the organization. This role involves timely movement of personnel and materials, maintaining assigned vehicles, and ensuring effective delivery and distribution processes.


Key Responsibilities


	Ensure proper handling and documentation of items being transported
	Maintain vehicle cleanliness and ensure regular servicing and maintenance schedules are followed
	Keep accurate records of trips, fuel usage, and maintenance activities
	Safely transport staff, and goods to designated locations as required
	Ensure compliance with traffic laws and organizational transport policies
	Adhere to assigned schedules and demonstrate flexibility when required
	Report any accidents, delays, or vehicle issues promptly.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Candidates should possess an SSCE/OND qualification with&nbsp;2-4 years driving experience, preferably in a corporate or structured environment
	Valid driver&rsquo;s license with a clean driving record
	Good knowledge of road networks and routes
	Basic understanding of logistics and inventory handling
	Strong sense of responsibility, punctuality, and reliability
	Good communication skills
	Professional attitude and good interpersonal conduct
	Candidate must reside in Abuja.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@najirealties.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as subject of email.",

Driver / Logistics Officer Job at Naji Realties




        
    

        
        Naji Realties is a leading hospitality and real estate company in Nigeria, dedicated to providing exceptional services and experiences that exceed our customers' expectations. With a strong presence in Abuja and Lagos, our experts are passionate about delivering top-notch solutions in property development, management, and hospitality. If you share our values and passion for excellence, we invite you to explore career opportunities with us. At Naji Realties, we foster a culture of growth, learning, and collaboration. Be part of our dynamic team and help us shape the future of hospitality and real estate in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Driver / Logistics Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Utako, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Part-time

Job Description


	The Driver / Logistics Officer is responsible for providing safe and efficient transportation, while supporting the coordination of logistics operations within the organization. This role involves timely movement of personnel and materials, maintaining assigned vehicles, and ensuring effective delivery and distribution processes.


Key Responsibilities


	Ensure proper handling and documentation of items being transported
	Maintain vehicle cleanliness and ensure regular servicing and maintenance schedules are followed
	Keep accurate records of trips, fuel usage, and maintenance activities
	Safely transport staff, and goods to designated locations as required
	Ensure compliance with traffic laws and organizational transport policies
	Adhere to assigned schedules and demonstrate flexibility when required
	Report any accidents, delays, or vehicle issues promptly.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Candidates should possess an SSCE/OND qualification with 2-4 years driving experience, preferably in a corporate or structured environment
	Valid driver’s license with a clean driving record
	Good knowledge of road networks and routes
	Basic understanding of logistics and inventory handling
	Strong sense of responsibility, punctuality, and reliability
	Good communication skills
	Professional attitude and good interpersonal conduct
	Candidate must reside in Abuja.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
